queries: Best spas in Katy TX comparison
action.query: Best spas in Katy TX comparison

content.text:
Katy, Texas, offers a variety of spas catering to diverse wellness and relaxation needs. Here's a comparison of some top-rated spas in the area:

**[Divinity Spa Katy](http://www.divinityspa-katy.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Facial spa · 4.9 (45 reviews)**  
_511 S Mason Rd Suite # 122, Katy, TX 77450_  
Led by esthetician Vilma Fernandez with over 22 years of experience, focusing on skincare treatments including facials, waxing, and body contouring.

**[KT WELLNESS SPA](https://www.ktwellnessspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Massage therapist · 5.0 (71 reviews)**  
_1820 Snake River Rd STE C, Katy, TX 77449_  
Provides a range of services such as Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, and sports massages, along with personalized facial treatments and waxing services.

**[FLOATspa](http://www.floatspakaty.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Spa · 4.9 (194 reviews)**  
_21733 Provincial Blvd #810, Katy, TX 77450_  
Specializes in flotation therapy to reduce stress and enhance healing, also offering hydro massage, infrared sauna, and cryotherapy treatments.

**[Katy Medi Spa](https://katymedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 4.5 (84 reviews)**  
_21238 Kingsland Blvd Ste. 1B, Katy, TX 77450_  
Focuses on medical spa services with treatments like Dysport injections, aiming to enhance appearance and boost confidence.

When choosing a spa, consider the specific services you desire, the expertise of the staff, and the overall ambiance to ensure a relaxing and rejuvenating experience.
